description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with broad, flat, dark green leaves arranged in a dense, layered fashion. The leaves are large and oval-shaped, with visible central veins and a slightly pointed tip, giving the plant a lush and healthy appearance. The plant is supported by a single, sturdy central stem that emerges from a simple, angular brown pot. The pot is plain and unadorned, with a geometric, almost rectangular profile, and appears to be made of a lightweight material. The foliage is full and extends outward in all directions, creating a bushy silhouette that would provide a touch of greenery to any urban environment. There are no visible flowers, labels, or decorative elements on the pot or plant.
description: A lush potted plant with broad, dark green leaves and a plain brown geometric pot, featuring dense foliage and a sturdy central stem.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense, overlapping leaves and the full, bushy appearance of the plant, with the pot mostly visible at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the layered arrangement of the leaves and reveals more of the pot's top opening.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizes the horizontal spread of the lower leaves and the straight central stem, with the pot's angular shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the curvature of the stem and the way the leaves fan out, with the pot partially obscured by foliage.
attribute_plant_species: Cassava (Manihot esculenta) or similar broadleaf tropical plant
